game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Ready Steady Bang** Ready Steady Bang is a quick-draw reaction game where players must tap the screen as fast as possible after an audible "Bang!" cue. The game displays "Ready..." then "Steady..." before the "Bang!" sound, and tapping prematurely results in an immediate "Foul!" and loss for that round. In single-player, players face 10 progressively challenging AI gunmen, each with faster reaction times, aiming to defeat all of them. Two players can duel on a single device, each tapping their respective half of the screen, with the fastest legitimate tap winning the round. Progression involves accumulating 31 "cowboy kills" to unlock achievements, and difficulty scales by the AI's decreasing reaction time and increased likelihood of attempting a foul.
game_info.description: Ready Steady Bang is a Western quick-draw duel game where split-second reactions determine victory. Face off against 10 increasingly skilled AI gunslingers in a test of nerves and reflexes. Wait for the "BANG!" signal after "Ready..." and "Steady..." prompts, then draw as fast as you can. Draw too early and you'll foul out. Defeat all 10 opponents to become the ultimate gunslinger and unlock the title of Legendary Gunfighter!
game_info.controls:
SPACE: Draw your weapon (after BANG! appears)
ENTER: Start the game from the title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
R: Return to the title screen from game over

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic gameplay mechanics including reaction timing, foul detection, and progression through multiple rounds. Validates that the game correctly handles input timing relative to the BANG signal and tracks wins/losses appropriately.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Performs a mix of valid and invalid draws to test the game's response. Waits for BANG signal before drawing in some rounds, and attempts early draws in others to verify foul detection works correctly. Tests progression through several AI opponents.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test should successfully complete several rounds, experiencing both wins and losses. Foul detection should trigger when drawing early, and valid draws should register correctly. The game should progress to subsequent opponents after wins.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the optimal winning strategy by implementing near-perfect reaction timing. This validates that a skilled player can defeat all 10 AI opponents and reach the win condition. Tests the complete game progression from start to victory.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Implements an optimal quick-draw strategy that waits for the BANG signal then responds with minimal delay (simulating human reaction time of 150-250ms). Consistently outdraws AI opponents by maintaining focus and avoiding fouls. Progresses through all 10 increasingly difficult opponents.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully defeats all 10 AI gunslingers without fouling. Achieves GAME_OVER_WIN state and displays victory message with final statistics. Validates that the game's difficulty progression is beatable with skilled play and proper timing.
